paperQuestionsVOS.analyzeContent:
n, d = map(int, input().split(' '))

x = list(map(int, input().split(' ')))

arr = [0 for i in range(n)]

for i in range(d):

arr[x[i]] += (i+1)

print(' '.join(map(str, arr)))
